title: Reasoning and Grounded Explanation Generation Using Vision-Language Models
description: Code, experiment configurations, Colab pipeline, final figures, and LaTeX sources for a controlled study of resource-constrained vision-language model fine-tuning. The study compares answer-only, rationale-generative, explanation-aware, BLIP-2 generative, and BLIP-2 contrastive-enhanced supervision across document, chart, science, commonsense, and natural-image visual question answering settings.
